mapper.sql: code, created_by, created_at, expires_at, max_uses, used_count, used_by, used_at, revoked, note
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM invite_codes
WHERE revoked = 0 AND (max_uses = 0 OR used_count < max_uses) AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > strftime('%s','now')*1000)
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE invite_codes SET revoked = 1 WHERE code = #{code}
